scripts.dev: concurrently -n 'sso,monitor,user,shell' -c 'yellow,cyan,green,blue' 'npm run dev -w packages/sso-server' 'npm run dev -w packages/remote-monitor' 'npm run dev -w packages/remote-user' 'sleep 3 && npm run dev -w packages/shell'
scripts.build:all: npm run build:monitor && npm run build:user && npm run build:shell
